description_long: This is a medium-sized dining fork with a polished metallic head and a dark, wood-textured handle. The fork features four evenly spaced, straight tines that are slightly curved upward for effective food pickup. The handle is gently tapered, with a rounded, ergonomic shape that widens at the midpoint and narrows toward the end, providing a comfortable grip. The transition between the metal and the handle is smooth, with no visible seams or fasteners. The metallic portion has a reflective, smooth finish, while the handle appears matte with subtle wood grain patterns. No branding, logos, or decorative markings are visible on any part of the fork.
description: A polished metal fork with four straight tines and a dark, wood-textured, ergonomic handle. The design is sleek and unadorned, with a smooth transition between the metal and handle.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the fork, highlighting the gentle curve of the tines and the smooth, tapered handle.
description_view_1: Top-down view displaying the four evenly spaced tines and the symmetrical, rounded handle.
description_view_2: Opposite side view similar to view 0, emphasizing the fork's slender profile and the subtle curvature of the tines.
description_view_3: End-on view showing the width of the tines and the narrow tip of the handle, with the fork's thickness visible.
attribute_handle_design: The handle is gently tapered with a rounded, ergonomic shape, featuring a dark wood texture and a smooth, seamless transition to the metal fork head.
attribute_tine_alignment: The tines are parallel, evenly spaced, and slightly curved upward with no visible irregularities.
